name: porake-kanban-skill
description: Markdown-based Kanban board managed by Codex. Cards live as .md files - no database, no server.

interface.shortDescription: Manage a Markdown Kanban board from project files.
interface.longDescription: Create, view, move, validate, and report on Kanban cards stored as Markdown files in a project's kanban/ directory.
defaultPrompt: Create a kanban card for this task.
